rationale.R1.6: The revisions improve the flow and readability of the text without altering technical claims or numbers.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented with consistent confidence; uncertainties are not flagged as there are no out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope, with no drift in coverage.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors or harmful content introduced, and minor regressions (if any) are not noticeable.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
